Obj.ToString: The cmdlet 'Expand-VariablesRecursively' returns an object of type 'System.String' but this type is not declared in the OutputType attribute.

Props.S: The cmdlet 'Expand-VariablesRecursively' returns an object of type 'System.String' but this type is not declared in the OutputType attribute.

Obj.ToString: File 'Test-JsonConfigExpansion.ps1' uses Write-Host. Avoid using Write-Host because it might not work in all hosts, does not work when there is no host, and (prior to PS 5.0) cannot be suppressed, captured, or redirected. Instead, use Write-Output, Write-Verbose, or Write-Information.

Props.S: File 'Test-JsonConfigExpansion.ps1' uses Write-Host. Avoid using Write-Host because it might not work in all hosts, does not work when there is no host, and (prior to PS 5.0) cannot be suppressed, captured, or redirected. Instead, use Write-Output, Write-Verbose, or Write-Information.
